title: Contact Luke - Luke Pollard MP
meta_description: Labour & Co-op Member of Parliament for Plymouth Sutton & Devonport
text_excerpt: Contact Luke - Luke Pollard MP Skip to main content Luke Pollard MP Labour & Co-op Member of Parliament for Plymouth Sutton & Devonport Join Get Involved Donate About Luke News Keyham’s Law £20 million extra for Devonport, Mount Wise and Morice Town Armada Way trees First Homes Not Second Homes Plymouth Buildings at Risk Make Devil’s Point a Bathing Water Electric Blanket Fundraiser smashes past the £6,000 mark National Marine Park The Plymouth White Papers Luke in Parliament General Election Results for 2024, 2019 and 2017 Get in touch Contact #MeetLuke Visit Luke in Parliament with your school Privacy Policy Social Media Policy Support Support with damp and mould issues Cost of living - advice Cost of living - support in Plymouth Sign up to Luke's Newsletter Join #Team Luke Ebrington Street survey Pride in Place: Morice Town, Mount Wise and Devonport More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact Luke How to contact Luke and the team Luke and his team work on a hybrid basis, but Luke is still here to help every day. If you need help please email [email protected] or call 01752 717255 and leave a message, the team will be checking these regularly and will get back in contact with you, please make sure you leave a phone number or email for us to contact you. The team is also available for in person meetings, on an appointment only basis, at my office at 13 Frankfort Gate, Plymouth, PL1 1QA on Tuesday or Thursday, between 10-12 and 2-4. Please call or email me for an appointment, and please be aware that if you visit on the day, you will be asked for your information and given an appointment time. If you would like to contact Luke about a parliamentary issue or raise a policy matter please contact Luke’s Westminster office Tel: 01752 717255 email: [email protected] Luke: “ When you contact me, please ensure that you include your name, phone number and your postal address. There’s a strict Parliamentary protocol that means I can only take up cases from people who live in Plymouth Sutton and Devonport.” If you would like to get in touch about Labour Party matters please email : [email protected] Social I believe politicians need to be more open, transparent and accountable. That’s one of the reasons why I am a big fan of using social media as part of my campaign. Social media is a good way of letting people see what I’m doing in real time, ask questions, watch videos, interact and share stories and pictures from my work in Parliament. Facebook I regularly have a Facebook Live Q&A on my page, which I will advertise beforehand. You can ask me anything. I think this is a good way to encourage more openness and transparency in our politics. #AskLuke X (formally known as Twitter) Twitter is a brilliant way of keeping track of what I’m up to. I tweet about what I am doing, the stuff I’m reading and things I’m generally interested in. I try to respond to all questions and tweets – sometimes by Direct Message – so make sure you’re following me if you want to ask a question so I can DM back. If your question doesn’t fit in 280 characters please email me [email protected] You can also follow Plymouth Labour on Twitter @PlymouthLabour Instagram Follow me on Instagram for a more personal take on my role as your MP and catch up on my latest videos and photos. You can also follow what I am doing on my Instagram stories YouTube I’ve been recording videos on YouTube for years. I think YouTube is a really good way of communicating what I am getting up to. You can watch my videos in Parliament since I was elected here. Remember to subscribe so you don’t miss any new content. Follow on social media Luke Pollard MP Contact details Luke Pollard, 13 Frankfort Gate, Plymouth, PL1 1QA Luke Pollard, 13 Frankfort Gate, Plymouth, PL1 1QA '> View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Printed and Promoted by Chris Cuddihee, on behalf of Luke Pollard, Lockyer Hall, Alfred Street, Plymouth PL1 2RP. Telephone: 01752 717255 ©2026 Copyr
